message:
fix(ft-api): tensor_triangular_solve autograd via apply_function with substitution backward [bd-skpl]

Second child of frankentorch-tw0y (linalg severed-autograd
umbrella). tensor_triangular_solve used to extract values, run
direct substitution, and rebuild a requires_grad=false leaf — same
severed-autograd pattern fixed under frankentorch-1tax.

Wrap in tensor_apply_function with the standard backward:
  X = A^{-1} B (A triangular)
  grad_B = A^{-T} grad_X
  grad_A = -A^{-T} grad_X X^T   masked to A's triangle

The grad_B leg is implemented inline as a fresh substitution on
A^T (swap (i, j) → (j, i) in indexing) with !upper triangle. The
grad_A leg outer-products grad_B with X^T then zeros out the
non-triangular half. A and X are saved for backward.

Adds triangular_solve_propagates_gradient_through_a_and_b
regression test:
  A = diag(2, 4) (lower), B = [10, 20]
  X = [5, 5], grad_X = [1, 1] under sum loss
  grad_B = [0.5, 0.25]
  grad_A_full = -[1/2, 1/4]^T outer [5, 5] → [[-2.5, -2.5], [-1.25, -1.25]]
  masked to lower triangle: [[-2.5, 0], [-1.25, -1.25]]

Closes frankentorch-skpl. ft-api lib tests: 1141 passing (+1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
